scenarios.description: parse(html, baseUri, parser) delegates correctly to provided Parser
scenarios.expectedResult: parser.parseInput called with html and baseUri
pseudocode: TEST TC12 parse with baseUri and custom parser
class Rec extends Parser { String lastIn, lastBase;
@Override public Document parseInput(String in, String baseUri) { lastIn=in; lastBase=baseUri; return Document.createShell(baseUri);} }
